description_long: This is a high-top canvas sneaker in a vibrant red color, featuring white rubber toe caps and midsoles. The shoe has white metal eyelets and white laces threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern. On the inner ankle area, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch with blue and white coloring. The outsole is made of white rubber with a black stripe running along the edge, and the heel displays the 'Converse All Star' branding in black. The shoe's upper is made of canvas, while the interior is likely lined with fabric for comfort. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of heavy wear.
description: A red high-top canvas sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and a visible Converse All Star logo patch. The shoe is clean and in good condition, with classic styling and branding details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red canvas upper, white laces, and the circular Converse All Star logo patch on the ankle.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the heel with 'Converse All Star' branding and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red canvas and white laces, without the logo patch visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the white rubber toe cap, laces, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner ankle, blue star with text in blue and red on white background; 'Converse All Star' text on the heel in black.
